scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix bot" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix bot && npm install --prefix web
scripts.build:web: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.db:seed: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx ts-node --compiler-options {"module":"CommonJS"} prisma/seed.ts

prisma.seed: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx ts-node --compiler-options {"module":"CommonJS"} prisma/seed.ts
